rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Email Forwarding Rule - Suspicious Folders

rules.rule_text:
title: Email Forwarding Rule - Suspicious Folders
id: f1595374-3a4a-4b40-aef5-0d854e043a14
status: experimental
description: "Looking for new rules alone may generate too many false positives, so\
  \ adding another \ncheck for commonly abused folders, suspicious criteria, and odd\
  \ names will help \nfilter out benign activity. RedCanary suggests looking for new\
  \ inbox rules that move or \ncopy emails to the following folders. Part of the RedCanary\
  \ 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/email-forwarding-rule/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.collection
- attack.t1114
- attack.t1114.003
logsource:
  service: exchange
  product: m365
detection:
  selection1:
    Workload: Exchange
    Operation:
    - New-InboxRule
    - Set-InboxRule
    Parameters|contains: MoveToFolder
  selection2:
    Parameters|contains:
    - RSS Feeds
    - RSS Subscriptions
    - Archive
    - Deleted Items
    - Conversation History
  condition: all of selection*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
